calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Set For Trial On Oct-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint'S First, Fifth, Sixth, Twelfth, Thirteenth, And Fifteenth Causes Of Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support (Per Insistence Of Filer)
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Attorney Robert C. Smith for Plaintiff Matt Watkins the moving party/ No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ANDREW CHUA Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint'S First, Fifth, Sixth, Twelfth, Thirteenth, And Fifteenth Causes Of Action is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden under CCP 425.16. Plaintiff did not file an opposition. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint'S First, Fifth, Sixth, Twelfth, Thirteenth, And Fifteenth Causes Of Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support (Per Insistence Of Filer)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Continued To Mar-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ANDREW CHUA'S Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint's First, Fifth, Sixth, Twelfth, Thirteenth, And Fifteenth Causes Of Action is continued to March 16, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than March 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Teri L. Jackson, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
